case_title: THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA VS. ALISTAR INSURANCE COMPANY et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMARY JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO DEFENDANT ALISTAR INSURANCE COMPANY CABLE CAR BAIL BONDS JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ALISTAR INSURANCE COMPANY CABLE CAR BAIL BONDS $7,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $101.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,601.00, TOTAL $7,601.00
